_meta.purpose: 接地谓词门 (固着↔健忘旋钮, body-diff-PG): 默认衰减 UNLESS 机器可核谓词证明此事仍开着。绝不靠 LLM。详 jarvis_grounded_predicate.py + docs/AGENT_KICKOFF_BODY_DIFFERENTIATION.md 不变量①。
guardrails: (a) 默认衰减: 无谓词/谓词not-open/不可判 → 衰减 (安全侧)
(b) 机器可核优先: still-open 只认 date_compare/commitment_watcher/external_state/claim_tracer, 绝不 LLM

fields.applies_to_kind: 适用节点 kind (现仅 concern)
fields.match: 限定: has_field 字段存在 / concern_id_pattern 正则
fields.backstop: 机器求值器: date_compare | commitment_watcher | external_state | claim_tracer

predicates._note: concern.deadline_ts > now → deadline 还在未来 = 仍开着 (体检/面试等有期限的事)
有 active 未履约承诺 concern_link 指向此 concern = 仍开着
concern.external_state == 'open' (账单仍 fail 等外部事实) = 仍开着
